data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for pre-filling from previous submissions.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of pre-filling from previous submissions in the intake form. However, the evidence provided does not include any concrete API reads or persisted state checks that demonstrate this functionality. The linked use case mentions the need for pre-filling but does not provide specific examples or evidence of its implementation, leading to an inconclusive verdict.
gaps: No evidence confirming the implementation of pre-filling from previous submissions.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the pre-filling functionality.
